SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
